title: Azure Glaze Ceramic
description: Premium handcrafted ceramic tile with an oceanic blue glaze finish, ideal for creating a calming bathroom oasis or a vibrant kitchen backsplash.
creator: Studio Handcrafted

title: Carrara Gold Marble
description: Exquisite white Italian marble featuring prominent gold and grey veining, polished to a high sheen for absolute luxury flooring and walls.
creator: Tuscany Quarries

title: Emerald Hexa Porcelain
description: Stunning hexagonal porcelain tiles in a rich deep forest emerald green color. Features a matte finish that provides slip resistance and modern geometric appeal.
creator: Geometrica Design

title: Terracotta Rustic Square
description: Traditional kiln-fired terracotta tiles bringing warm, rustic Mediterranean charm. Natural earthy tones and textured surfaces perfect for outdoor patios.
creator: Earthy Creations

title: Classic Mono Checkerboard
description: High-contrast black and white vitrified tiles creating the iconic retro checkerboard layout. Extremely durable and easy to maintain.
creator: RetroTiles Inc.

title: Vintage Portuguese Ceramic
description: Intricate hand-painted replica tiles inspired by 18th-century Portuguese Azulejos. Adds unmatched historical elegance to walls and accents.
creator: Lisboa Artisan Guild

title: Midnight Quartz Gloss
description: Dark dark grey and black quartz tile composite featuring subtle sparkling mirror flecks that capture and reflect light beautifully.
creator: Sparkle Stone Co.

title: Sandstone Textured Slab
description: Natural grey-beige sandstone cut into large slabs, retaining its original rough sedimentary texture for a completely organic feel.
creator: RockHedge Materials

title: Onyx Translucent Luxury
description: Premium translucent green-honey onyx slabs, perfect for backlighting to reveal deep crystalline geological layers.
creator: LuxStone Atelier

title: Moroccan Zellige Teal
description: Enamelled terracotta tiles traditionally handcrafted in Fez, Morocco. Features beautiful slight imperfections and shade variations in glossy teal.
creator: Fez Mosaic Cooperative
